meaning: v.远足,飞起,步行n.远足,增加
examples: The site is reached by a 30-minute hike through dense forest.
He had been bitten by a snake during a rough hike.
Join a small group hike tour for an evening of exploration in the heart of Washington.
More than half think the Fed will hike rates in the latter half of the year.
We take off in pursuit, doing a fast hike straight up the steep ridge.
